remarks: Enjoy easy living in this charming 2-bedroom, 1-bath apartment located in a sought-after Westport neighborhood. Filled with natural light, the home features a spacious living room that opens to a modern kitchen with stainless steel appliances, a gas cooktop, and a wine refrigerator. Both bedrooms offer comfortable space, and hardwood floors run throughout the apartment, adding timeless appeal. Practical amenities include in-unit laundry, generous storage, and a private garage with additional driveway parking. Surrounded by beautifully maintained grounds, the property offers a peaceful setting while remaining close to everything Westport has to offer. Residents appreciate access to Westport's town beaches, top-rated schools, and convenient commuting options. Available unfurnished for preferably 2-year lease term.
